title: Property Consultant - Prestige Estates - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Prestige Estates - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
We at Prestige Estates are looking for an experienced Property Consultant based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Prestige Estates:
Prestige Estates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Prestige Estates!
